opportunities.description:
# 🟢 Good First Issue: Implement "Restore Task" Functionality — Beginner Friendly

**Time:** ~15–25 minutes

`good first issue` · `help wanted` · `feature` · `react` · `localstorage` · `hacktoberfest`

**Good For:** Beginners learning state management, UI interactions, and data persistence

opportunities.title: [OSS] voiceyBill/voiceyBill-server: [Bug]: API returns "transations" (missing 'c') — typo in field name across backend, web, and mobile
opportunities.description:
### Severity

S3 - Medium (workaround exists)

### Bug summary

The `getAllTransactionService` in the backend declares and returns a variable named transations (missing the letter c). Both the web and mobile clients read `data?.transations` — matching the same typo. While the app works today because all three sides use the same misspelling, this is a latent correctness issue: any new client, API consumer, or contributor following convention will use `transactions` and receive `undefined`. The field name in the public API response should be `transactions`.

### Steps to reproduce

1. Call GET /

opportunities.title: Frontend Softwareentwickler (m/w/d)
opportunities.description:
Du hast ein Faible für moderne Weboberflächen, sauber konzipierte Software und leistungsstarke Single-Page-Anwendungen?
Dann könnte TecFox hervorragend zu dir passen.

Als moderner IT-Dienstleister setzen wir bundesweit anspruchsvolle Projekte für namhafte Kund:innen aus unterschiedlichen Branchen um. Dabei kombinieren wir tiefgehendes technisches Know-how mit pragmatischen, praxisorientierten Lösungen. Klare Entscheidungswege, effiziente Abläufe und ein bewusst schlank gehaltener Verwaltungsaufwand prägen unsere tägliche Arbeit.

Aufgaben

Als Front

opportunities.title: [OSS] voiceyBill/voiceyBill-web: [Bug]: Account settings "Update account" button saves even when nothing has changed
opportunities.description:
### Severity

S4 - Low (minor issue)

### Bug summary

The "Update account" button in Settings → Account has no dirty-state check. React Hook Form provides `formState.isDirty` to detect whether the user has actually changed any field, but it is not used here. Clicking "Update account" with the original values unchanged fires a full API call (`PATCH /api/user`) unnecessarily, re-uploading the same data and wasting a network request.

### Steps to reproduce

1. Go to Settings → Account
2. Do NOT change the name or profile picture
3. Click "Update account"
4. Observe: API call is made and "Accoun

opportunities.title: Junior PR Manager (m/w/d) – Remote oder Berlin
opportunities.description:
Overview

PR steht vor einem strukturellen Bruch. Vertrauen verschiebt sich, Sichtbarkeit wird neu verteilt, KI wächst exponentiell. Wir bei getpress glauben, dass Reputation in den nächsten zehn Jahren der entscheidende Wettbewerbsvorsprung für Unternehmen wird. Und dass die Agentur, die das ernst nimmt, anders aussehen muss als die Agentur von gestern.

Deshalb bauen wir die PR Company der Zukunft. Outcome-getrieben statt Retainer-Stunden. KI-first statt KI-on-top. Automatisiert, wo es skaliert und menschlich, wo es wirklich zählt. Unser über 40 köpfiges Team aus Journalist*

[OSS] kubestellar/console: 📝 test: missing Vitest/RTL coverage for useQuantum* hook glue and Quantum card UI components
opportunities.description:
### Feature Description

The `useCachedQuantum.ts` exports four public hooks and the `web/src/components/cards/quantum/`
folder contains three UI components — none of which have any test coverage on main today:

**Hooks with no glue-level tests:**
- useQuantumSystemStatus
- useQuantumAuthStatus
- useQuantumCircuitAscii
- useQuantumQubitGridData

**UI components with no test files at all:**
- QuantumStatus.tsx
- QuantumCircuitViewer.tsx
- QuantumQubitGrid.tsx

### Proposed Solution

Would cover:

Hook tests (Vitest + renderHook):
1. useQuantumSystemStatus — unauthenticated path returns disabled

opportunities.title: [OSS] voiceyBill/voiceyBill-App: [Bug]: Account settings "Update account" button fires even when nothing has changed
opportunities.description:
### Severity

S4 - Low (minor issue)

### Bug summary

The "Update account" button on the mobile Account settings screen is active and fires a live API request even when the user has not changed their name or selected a new photo. The button is only disabled during the in-flight request `(disabled={isSaving})` — no dirty-state check exists. This means every tap sends a real `PATCH /user` request and shows a success alert regardless of whether anything was modified.

### Steps to reproduce

1. Open the mobile app and log in.
2. Navigate to Settings → Account.
3. Do NOT change the name or profil

opportunities.title: [OSS] voiceyBill/voiceyBill-App: [Bug]: Transactions screen flashes "No transactions found" before data loads
opportunities.description:
### Severity

S4 - Low (minor issue)

### Bug summary

The `FlatList` in `TransactionsScreen` renders `ListEmptyComponent` ("No transactions found") unconditionally whenever the items array is empty — including during the initial data fetch while `isLoading` is `true`. Users briefly see the empty state before their transactions appear, creating a false impression that the fetch failed or the account has no data.

### Steps to reproduce

1. Open the Transactions tab (most noticeable on a slower connection)
2. Observe: "No transactions found" appears immediately on screen
3. 1–2 seconds later, a

opportunities.description:
# 🎯 Issue Overview

The About Page plays a critical role in establishing PGT Global Network’s authority, mission clarity, and credibility as a purpose-driven organization.

Currently, this page can be enhanced to better reflect the scale, vision, leadership, and real-world impact of the organization through stronger structure, storytelling, and premium UI/UX.

The goal is to transform the About Page into a more powerful trust-building experience.

---

# 🚀 Goal

Redesign and enhance the About Page to better communicate:

- Organizational mission
- Vision and purpose
- Leadership credibility

opportunities.title: [OSS] tylerjrbuell/reactive-agents-ts: Add `maxTokens` budget killswitch to compose API
opportunities.description:
## Summary

The compose API has 6 killswitches (`maxIterations`, `budgetLimit`, `timeoutAfter`, `watchdog`, `requireApprovalFor`, `confidenceFloor`). Add `maxTokens` — abort a run when total token usage (prompt + completion) exceeds a threshold.

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] `.compose(harness)` accepts `{ maxTokens: number }`
- [ ] Run aborts cleanly (same path as `budgetLimit`) when threshold crossed
- [ ] `RunResult` `stopReason` is `'max-tokens'`
- [ ] Unit tests in `packages/compose/src/killswitches/max-tokens.test.ts`
- [ ] Documented in `apps/docs/src/content/docs/compose-api.mdx`

## F

opportunities.title: [OSS] tylerjrbuell/reactive-agents-ts: Add `create-reactive-agent` template for Cloudflare Workers
opportunities.description:
## Summary

`npx create-reactive-agent` ships 4 templates (basic, tool-use, multi-provider, local). Add a 5th: `cloudflare-worker` — a deployable Cloudflare Workers agent.

## What the template should include

- `wrangler.toml` + `src/index.ts` with a Durable Object or plain Worker handler
- Agent wired to `OpenAIAdapter` (Works on CF edge; Anthropic SDK needs Node compat flag)
- `.dev.vars` stub for API key
- `bun run deploy` script
- README with one-command deploy instructions

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] `npx create-reactive-agent --template cloudflare-worker` scaffolds the project
- [ ]

opportunities.title: [OSS] tylerjrbuell/reactive-agents-ts: Add JSON Schema validation to tool definitions
opportunities.description:
## Summary

Tool definitions (passed as `tools` to an agent) accept arbitrary JSON Schema but are never validated. A malformed schema silently produces bad provider calls. Add schema validation at tool registration time.

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Validate each tool's `inputSchema` against JSON Schema meta-schema (draft-07 or later) when `createAgent({ tools })` is called
- [ ] Throw a typed `ToolSchemaError` (with `toolName` and validation errors) on invalid schema — fail fast, not at runtime
- [ ] Tests cover: valid schema passes, missing `type`, invalid `properties` ref, extra `$ref` to
